productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Tall Dark Blue Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionDark grey and blue striped polo neck t-shirt made of 100% enriched cotton with short sleeves, buttoned cuff, short buttoned placket, buttoned flap at the back of the collar, threadwork on left shoulder blade, vented hem and graphic print detailing with lettering and embroidery on the left chestWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) FittingSlimWash care Machine wash in 30 degrees with like colors Wash dark colors separately Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Do not bleach Reshape garment in wet condition to its original form Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Pay tribute to your favorite Irish beer, Guinness, by donning this blue and dark grey striped polo neck tee from classic polo. Look stylish as you hang out in this t-shirt, whether or not you're drinking beer! Pair it with jeans or chinos to look irresistible. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
